data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. AEROPOWER debuted here last start over today's distance and finished a close fifth of nine after coming from last into the turn. Will improve and looks well placed to finish in the top three. 8. THRILL SEEKER finished second of six at Gatton two runs back when trying to lead all of the way over 800m at this track, then last start never fired when finishing eighth of nine over 800m at this track after racing midfield into the turn. Jumps from an inside draw and is worth another chance. 1. ALMOND GOLD resumes from a spell and should have strengthened up during his break. Has solid each-way claims. 6. JADA ROSE makes her racing debut and in this line-up is worth including in combinations.","runners":[7,8,1,6],"exclusive":true}
